recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Demon Seed
recommendations.overview: A scientist creates Proteus, an organic supercomputer with artificial intelligence which becomes obsessed with human beings, and in particular the creator's wife.

recommendations.title: What Lies Below
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward teenager is blindsided when her mother introduces her to her new fiancée. At first, his charm, intelligence, and beauty seem too good to be true, and after a series of strange occurrences, the teenage daughter realizes that this ne

recommendations.title: M3GAN
recommendations.overview: A brilliant toy company roboticist uses artificial intelligence to develop M3GAN, a life-like doll programmed to emotionally bond with her newly orphaned niece. But when the doll's programming works too well, she becomes overprotective of her new fri

recommendations.title: Debug
recommendations.overview: Six young computer hackers sent to work on a derelict space freighter, are forced to match wits with a vengeful artificial intelligence that would kill to be human.

recommendations.title: What Happened to Monday
recommendations.overview: In a world where families are limited to one child due to overpopulation, a set of identical septuplets must avoid being put to a long sleep by the government and dangerous infighting while investigating the disappearance of one of their own.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Vivarium
recommendations.overview: A young woman and her fiancé are in search of the perfect starter home. After following a mysterious real estate agent to a new housing development, the couple finds themselves trapped in a maze of identical houses and forced to raise an otherworldly

recommendations.title: Jonathan
recommendations.overview: Jonathan is a young man with a strange condition that only his brother understands.  But when he begins to yearn for a different life, their unique bond becomes increasingly tested.

recommendations.title: Censor
